summary: 22/22 pairwise regression tests passed for the Find a Sub absence creation flow on the live InstaSub instance, using the school-level admin account (schooladmin@mailinator.com) across all 6 reasons, 5 duration types, and 2 sub preferences.

content.text: h2. Description

Pairwise regression coverage for the Find a Sub absence creation flow. The test signs in to the school-level admin account and creates absences using the Find a Sub mode across every reason, duration type, and substitute preference available in this flow. The run confirms the form, substitute search panel, class time inputs, and sub picker all behave correctly in Find a Sub mode.
h2. Test Scope
Environment: InstaSub Live — InstaSub
Login: school-level admin account — username [schooladmin@mailinator.com|mailto:schooladmin@mailinator.com], password [redacted]
Flow: Find a Sub absence creation (/absence/createAbsence), type: Find a Sub
Sub selected (Assign a specific sub): Sub 1
h2. Pairwise Matrix
Coverage dimensions
6 reasons: Sick, Personal, Vacation, Illness-Family Member, Educational Leave, Professional Development
5 duration types: Full Day, Half Day AM, Half Day PM, Enter Time Manually (09:00–15:00), Add Class
2 sub preferences: Notify all subs, Assign a specific sub
h3. Part A — Duration Tests (T1–T16)
||#||Date||Reason||Duration||Sub Preference||Sub Selected||Result||
|T1|Jan 1, 2027|Sick|Full Day|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T2|Jan 2, 2027|Personal|Full Day|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T3|Jan 3, 2027|Vacation|Full Day|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T4|Jan 4, 2027|Illness-Family Member|Full Day|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T5|Jan 5, 2027|Educational Leave|Half Day AM|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T6|Jan 6, 2027|Professional Development|Half Day AM|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T7|Jan 7, 2027|Sick|Half Day AM|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T8|Jan 8, 2027|Personal|Half Day AM|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T9|Jan 9, 2027|Vacation|Half Day PM|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T10|Jan 10, 2027|Illness-Family Member|Half Day PM|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T11|Jan 11, 2027|Educational Leave|Half Day PM|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T12|Jan 12, 2027|Professional Development|Half Day PM|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T13|Jan 13, 2027|Sick|Enter Time Manually (09:00–15:00)|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T14|Jan 14, 2027|Personal|Enter Time Manually (09:00–15:00)|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T15|Jan 15, 2027|Vacation|Enter Time Manually (09:00–15:00)|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T16|Jan 18, 2027|Illness-Family Member|Enter Time Manually (09:00–15:00)|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
h3. Part B — Add Class Tests (T17–T22)
Add Class replaces the Duration dropdown. The class time inputs define the absence window.
||#||Date||Reason||Class Time||Sub Preference||Sub Selected||Result||
|T17|Jan 25, 2027|Educational Leave|08:00–12:00|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T18|Jan 26, 2027|Professional Development|10:00–14:00|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T19|Jan 27, 2027|Sick|09:00–11:00|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T20|Feb 8, 2027|Personal|12:00–16:00|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
|T21|Feb 9, 2027|Vacation|08:00–10:00|Notify all subs|—|(/) PASS|
|T22|Feb 10, 2027|Illness-Family Member|13:00–17:00|Assign a specific sub|Sub 1|(/) PASS|
h2. Result

22/22 tests passed. All 6 reasons, all 5 duration types (including Add Class), and both available sub preferences exercised. Sub 1 was successfully selected for all Assign a specific sub cases. The substitute search panel correctly required a date to be entered before listing available subs, and the submit button changed to "Create And Assign" when Assign a specific sub was selected.
h2. Acceptance Criteria
Login succeeds with the school-level admin account ([schooladmin@mailinator.com|mailto:schooladmin@mailinator.com])
All 6 absence reasons selectable via the Find a Sub flow
Selecting Find a Sub reveals additional fields: School Location, Position, Grade, Subject, Subbing For, Add Class, Add Location
Only 2 sub preferences are available in Find a Sub mode: Notify all subs and Assign a specific sub
All 4 standard duration types (Full Day, Half Day AM, Half Day PM, Enter Time Manually) work in Find a Sub mode
Half Day AM auto-sets times to 08:00 AM – 12:00 PM (read-only)
Half Day PM auto-sets times to 12:00 PM – 05:00 PM (read-only)
Enter Time Manually renders editable Start/End time fields
Add Class flow works for all 6 reasons in Find a Sub mode
Selecting Assign a specific sub triggers a date-gated substitute search panel listing available subs
Sub 1 selectable via Assign a specific sub
Submit button changes to "Create And Assign" when Assign a specific sub is selected
A toast notification confirms successful absence creation with a unique confirmation number
No blocking errors or UI failures across the 22-test run
